headline_metrics.label: Net-new Posts
headline_metrics.note: Net-new Posts after within-run and cross-run deduplication.

headline_metrics.label: Unique authors
headline_metrics.note: Distinct post authors across the broad run.

headline_metrics.label: Direct-builder claims
headline_metrics.note: Posts attributed to the actual builder, not commentary or third-party reporting.

headline_metrics.label: Level A artifact Posts
headline_metrics.note: Posts carrying a Level A external product artifact. This is a Post count, not a company count.

headline_metrics.label: Actionable Posts
headline_metrics.note: Posts passing attribution and artifact checks.

headline_metrics.label: Consolidated companies or projects
headline_metrics.note: Consolidated companies or projects. Not a count of incorporated startups.

headline_metrics.label: Enriched profiles
headline_metrics.note: Shortlisted profiles enriched. Not a count of funded companies.

headline_metrics.label: Estimated activity (USD)
headline_metrics.note: Estimated API activity. Not reconciled against the external Developer Console.

headline_metrics.label: Estimated remaining (USD)
headline_metrics.note: Unused portion of the USD 25.000 estimated allowance.

headline_metrics.label: Original engine tests
headline_metrics.note: Passing tests in the original private engine repository.

metric_notes.estimated_activity_usd: Estimated API activity. Not reconciled against the external Developer Console.
metric_notes.level_a_artifact_posts: Posts carrying a Level A external product artifact. This is a Post count, not a company count.
metric_notes.net_new_posts: Net-new Posts after within-run and cross-run deduplication.
metric_notes.profiles_enriched: Shortlisted profiles enriched. Not a count of funded companies.

Count preflight to size volume before any retrieval.
